monitors.name: mcp-server-errors
monitors.description: Obsidian MCP server error log — surfaces ERROR/FATAL/uncaughtException from the server log in real time

monitors.name: vault-file-changes
monitors.description: Vault file change watcher — notifies when vault topics or decisions are modified externally (Obsidian UI, other sessions, git pull)
monitors.command: fswatch -r --event Created --event Updated --event Removed ~/Documents/Obsidian/AI-Work/topics/ ~/Documents/Obsidian/AI-Work/decisions/ ~/Documents/Obsidian/AI-Home/topics/ ~/Documents/Obsidian/AI-Home/decisions/ 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r path; do echo "Vault changed: $path"; done
